projectName: AWS Secrets Store CSI Driver Provider
projectDescription: The AWS provider for the Secrets Store CSI Driver fetches secrets from AWS Secrets Manager and SSM Parameter Store and mounts them as files in Kubernetes pods.
keyFeatures: Mount AWS Secrets Manager secrets as files in Kubernetes pods
Mount AWS SSM Parameter Store parameters as files in Kubernetes pods
IAM Roles for Service Accounts (IRSA) authentication
Automated failover across AWS regions for high availability
JMESPath support for extracting individual keys from JSON secrets
FIPS endpoint support for compliance requirements
Helm chart deployment with configurable values
publicApiSurface: SecretDescriptor: objectName, objectType, objectAlias, objectVersion, objectVersionLabel, filePermission, jmesPath, failoverObject
Helm values: image, awsRegion, driverWritesSecrets, useFipsEndpoint, podIdentityHttpTimeout, resources, affinity, tolerations
SecretProviderClass parameters: objects, region, failoverRegion, pathTranslation, usePodIdentity, preferredAddressType
